# AI-Due

Sitemap: https://ai-due.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://ai-due.com/robots.txt

AI-Due is an AI public-opinion simulation platform for strategy, communications, risk, investor relations, policy, and market-research teams.

## Site
- URL: https://ai-due.com
- Languages: English and French
- Publisher: AI-Due
- Sitemap: https://ai-due.com/sitemap.xml
- Contact: https://ai-due.com/en/contact

## Product Focus
- Multi-agent simulations for public-opinion scenarios
- Synthetic audience personas and knowledge graphs
- Social reaction, editorial sentiment, and prediction-signal modeling
- Multilingual scenario comparison
- ReACT-style reports with agent citations and confidence signals
- European-first positioning for regulated and multilingual organizations

- https://ai-due.com/

## Content Notes
AI-Due content should be interpreted as scenario-planning and synthetic-research material. Use the sitemap for the current canonical URL list.
